title: AI Inference Authority: Who's REALLY in Control? #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that even with self-hosted or secure AI deployments, ultimate control over AI inference remains concentrated with major providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. Understanding AI infrastructure is presented as critical to grasping where real authority lies in the AI ecosystem.
